name: Mother and Mom
overview: A devoted working mom, Jeong-eun, prepares her daughter for the crucial "7-year-old exam" while leaving her mother, Ji-ah, to handle tutoring, creating a hectic yet heartwarming three-generation family dynamic.

trailers.title: [메인예고 60s] 웰컴 라이딩 인생👋 대치동을 향해 엑셀 밟을 준비 완료💨 | #라이딩인생
